title: ageratinastrum polyphyllum
intro: Ageratinastrum polyphyllum, also known as the many-leaved shrub or the African shrub, is a plant species belonging to the family Lamiaceae. It is used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Ageratinastrum polyphyllum include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, improve immune function, and exhibit antioxidant activity. Ageratinastrum polyphyllum can be prepared into herbal remedies, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used in traditional medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
